name: GEORGE RISK INDUSTRIES, INC.
summary: George Risk Industries, Inc. (GRI), incorporated in 1967 in Colorado, designs, manufactures, and sells security alarm components and systems, custom computer keyboards, proximity switches, pool access alarms, EZ Duct wire covers, water sensors, electronic switching devices, high security switches, and cable/wire installation tools. The security division comprises approximately 96% of net revenues, selling to distributors and alarm dealers. Key customers include Ademco, Inc. and Anixter, Inc.
